name: Ubiquiti UniFi AC Mesh
title: Ubiquiti UniFi AC Mesh
short_description: Indoor / Outdoor AP 2.4GHz (300Mbps) & 5GHz (867Mbps), 1xGLAN, with coverage 140 m²
description: Indoor / Outdoor AP 2.4GHz (300Mbps) & 5GHz (867Mbps), 1xGLAN, with coverage 140 m²

detailed_description.heading: Omnidirectional Coverage
detailed_description.text: Explore the UniFi AC Mesh, an advanced, all-weather, omnidirectional WiFi access point designed to excel across both the 2.4 GHz and 5 GHz bands. This robust model is engineered with a durable, UV-resistant plastic housing that effectively shields internal electronics from environmental elements, ensuring long-term reliability and performance in diverse outdoor and indoor settings. Its versatile mounting options on either walls or poles allow for flexible installation in a variety of environments, from expansive outdoor areas to complex indoor layouts. The UniFi AC Mesh offers exceptional wireless coverage, featuring a state-of-the-art antenna design that achieves a symmetrical-link coverage area. This design ensures uniform signal distribution with a range of over 180 meters, providing consistent upload and download speeds across the entire coverage area. Such comprehensive coverage is particularly beneficial in settings such as large open office spaces, bustling conference halls, or sprawling public areas like parks or campuses.

detailed_description.heading: Dynamic Environment Adaptability
detailed_description.text:
Built on advanced Mesh technology, the UniFi AC Mesh is engineered for exceptional fault tolerance and network efficiency, making it an ideal choice for dynamic and challenging environments like busy summer sites, city parks, and expansive outdoor venues. This access point ensures robust operation even in the event of component failures, thanks to its high fault tolerance achieved through redundant network configurations. This redundancy allows it to maintain consistent service by automatically rerouting data or managing the load across multiple nodes if one node experiences issues, thereby preventing downtime and ensuring continuous network availability.

The UniFi AC Mesh combines plug-and-play simplicity with Mesh networking technology. This technology allows the access point to be part of a self-configuring network that automatically identifies the most efficient data paths and manages coverage dynamically. Multiple nodes work together to spread network coverage over a broad area, creating a resilient mesh of connectivity that eliminates dead zones and ensures consistent access across varying landscapes. This is particularly valuable in areas where traditional single-router setups fall short, such as complex indoor layouts or expansive outdoor areas.

detailed_description.heading: High-Bandwidth Applications
detailed_description.text:
Seamlessly supporting the modern 802.11ac standard, also known as Wi-Fi 5, the UniFi AC Mesh offers superior performance on the less congested 5GHz band. This standard brings significant advancements such as wider channel bandwidths up to 160 MHz, multiple MIMO spatial streams, and higher-density modulation of 256-QAM. These features collectively enhance throughput and data transmission efficiency, making the UniFi AC Mesh well-suited for high-bandwidth applications like HD video streaming and intensive online gaming. Additionally, backward compatibility with earlier 802.11b/g/n revisions ensures effortless integration into existing networks, allowing for a smooth and cost-effective upgrade path without the need to replace older devices immediately.

With dual-band capabilities, the UniFi AC Mesh boasts aggregate speeds of up to 1167 Mbps, distributed as up to 300 Mbps on the 2.4 GHz band and up to 867 Mbps on the 5 GHz band. This speed allocation supports a wide range of devices and activities, efficiently handling more than 150 simultaneous connections. This capacity is ideal for environments with high user density, ensuring that all connected devices enjoy fast and reliable internet access.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Operational Standards
detailed_description.text:
Power the UniFi AC Mesh with ease using a variety of methods such as an 802.3af compatible switch, a UniFi PoE Switch, or the included Gigabit PoE adapter, each offering a streamlined solution for electrical power and data delivery across a single Ethernet cable. This flexibility in power options underscores the device's versatility, allowing for deployment in diverse physical settings where traditional power setups might be challenging or restrictive. The UniFi AC Mesh is equipped with a single Ethernet port that supports up to 1000 Mbps bandwidth, facilitating high-speed data transfers that ensure the network's backhaul does not throttle the device's performance. This capability is complemented by the device’s support for both Passive PoE 24V and 802.3af standards. While Passive PoE provides a constant voltage without negotiation, making it simple and cost-effective, 802.3af dynamically adjusts power delivery based on the connected device’s requirements, enhancing safety and compatibility.

On the wireless front, the UniFi AC Mesh operates under the 802.11 a/b/g/n/r/k/v/ac standards, delivering a broad compatibility range with various devices and optimizing network performance. It incorporates MIMO technology with 2x2 configurations on both the 2.4GHz and 5GHz bands. This setup not only enhances data throughput and network resilience by using multiple antennas to manage more data simultaneously but also improves overall network efficiency and connectivity stability. In terms of performance, the UniFi AC Mesh is designed to handle extreme conditions, operating effectively in a temperature range from -30 °C to 70 °C. This durability makes it suitable for a variety of environments, ensuring reliable service regardless of external weather conditions. Additionally, the device boasts a maximum power consumption of only 8.5W, highlighting its efficiency in energy use while maintaining high operational standards.

detailed_description.heading: UniFi Network Application Integration
detailed_description.text:
Integrated with the UniFi Network Application, this access point forms part of a robust enterprise wireless management system, ideal for environments requiring high-density client deployments. Through the UniFi Network Application, network administrators can efficiently manage multiple networks from a unified interface, streamlining the configuration and monitoring of network devices across various locations. This centralized platform offers real-time network performance insights, enabling administrators to apply configuration changes to multiple networks simultaneously, thereby enhancing operational efficiency.

The application also excels in managing network users and guests, providing tools to create and manage user groups with specific access rights and custom guest portals tailored for different needs. These features ensure appropriate access levels, significantly boosting network security. Additionally, the ability to remotely upgrade device firmware enhances device security and performance across the network by addressing vulnerabilities and updating features without manual intervention. Furthermore, the UniFi Network Application allows for the customization of guest hotspot design, architecture, and privacy settings. Administrators can personalize the login experience, set bandwidth limits, and integrate brand elements, creating a cohesive and controlled guest access environment. Advanced options such as voucher systems are also available to regulate and potentially monetize access. Enhanced privacy controls within the application help in managing data retention and user activity logs, ensuring compliance with privacy regulations. These features, along with the capability to segment network traffic and encrypt user data, bolster both security and privacy for users and guests alike.

Adding to its versatility, the mobile app component of the UniFi Network Application facilitates quick device setup and on-the-go management, providing administrators with the flexibility to manage the network remotely. This integration is particularly beneficial in dynamic settings like hotels, educational institutions, offices, and retail spaces, where managing diverse user needs and maintaining stringent security protocols are paramount.
